self = search_service = payload = '{{7*7}}', evaluated_result = '49' @allure.title("SSTI payload [{payload}] in search — not evaluated by template engine") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) @pytest.mark.parametrize( ("payload", "evaluated_result"), [ ("{{9999*9999}}", "99980001"), ("{{7*7}}", "49"), ("<%=7*7%>", "Search - 49"), ("${7*7}", "Search - 49"), ], ) def test_ssti_in_search_not_evaluated_inline( self, search_service: SearchService, payload: str, evaluated_result: str, ): with allure.step(f"GET search with SSTI payload: {payload!r}"): LOGGER.info("Step: SSTI search payload=%r", payload) resp = search_service.search(payload) with allure.step(f"Assert evaluated result {evaluated_result!r} absent"): assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK > assert evaluated_result not in resp.text, ( f"SSTI payload {payload!r} evaluated: {evaluated_result!r} found in response" ) E AssertionError: SSTI payload '{{7*7}}' evaluated: '49' found in response E assert '49' not in '' E E '49' is contained here: E E E E E E E E E E E E Search - {{7*7}} E E E E E E E E
